'''Carnuss Gorguul''' was an ancient [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] whose citadel ruins became the site of a [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] event during the waning [[Standard day/Legends|days]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] before the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
